('Cross-site Scripting')"}], "description": "Lack of validation of filter_target parameter on return_dynamic_filters.php (normally used as an AJAX in View Issues Page) allows an attacker to inject arbitrary HTML if the target is a TEXTAREA custom field.

### Impact
Cross-site scripting (XSS)

None
